claim: A hypothesis packet is safer to promote when it includes positive, negative, and counterfactual controls before interpretation.
revision_reason: Adds explicit controls so MC does not mistake any single observed pattern for causal or mechanistic support.

measurable_variables.name: control_condition_count
measurable_variables.sampling_rule: count declared control condition fields per packet

measurable_variables.name: decision_rule_presence
measurable_variables.sampling_rule: mark present only when pass and fail patterns are both declared

control_conditions.positive_control: A packet with all required controls should pass validation.
control_conditions.negative_control: A packet with no negative control should fail validation.
control_conditions.counterfactual_control: A packet with plausible alternate interpretation should require a discriminating decision rule.

expected_result.pass_pattern: Valid packets contain all control types and a clear decision rule.
expected_result.fail_pattern: Invalid packets omit controls, collapse missingness, or lack null-result handling.
expected_result.decision_rule: Promote only when controls, variables, missingness, and null handling are complete.

null_result_handling: A null result is preserved as inconclusive or contradicted evidence rather than being deleted or reinterpreted as support.
falsification_route: If packets without controls are promoted at the same rate as controlled packets, this gate fails its purpose.

claim: A hypothesis packet can be promoted with only a positive control if the pattern looks coherent.
revision_reason: This fixture should fail because it has no negative control and would over-promote coherent stories.

measurable_variables.name: control_condition_count
measurable_variables.sampling_rule: count declared control condition fields per packet

measurable_variables.name: decision_rule_presence
measurable_variables.sampling_rule: mark present only when pass and fail patterns are both declared

control_conditions.positive_control: A packet with an obvious expected pattern should pass validation.
control_conditions.counterfactual_control: A different explanation could produce the same observation.

expected_result.decision_rule: Reject when negative control is missing.

null_result_handling: Null results should not be silently converted into support.
falsification_route: Validator should reject this fixture because negative control is blank.

claim: Missing observations can be treated as evidence that the signal was absent.
revision_reason: This fixture should fail because it lacks unknown or not_collected missingness states.

measurable_variables.name: observed_fraction
measurable_variables.sampling_rule: divide observed points by declared expected points

control_conditions.positive_control: A packet with unknown and not_collected states should pass.
control_conditions.negative_control: A packet with only observed and not_observed states should fail.
control_conditions.counterfactual_control: No record could mean not collected rather than not present.

expected_result.pass_pattern: Missingness can be separated from true non-observation.
expected_result.decision_rule: Reject when missingness state space lacks unknown or not_collected.

null_result_handling: A null result remains null only when collection status is known.
falsification_route: Validator should reject packets that cannot represent unknown or not_collected states.
